name: delivery-team
description: Hook-free multi-agent feature-delivery pipeline. An orchestrator plus 10 specialist subagents (11 agents total) drive requirements -> design -> UI flow -> implementation -> review -> test -> build, with enforced quality gates, bounded remediation loops, and a durable, auditable per-feature log that survives session restarts. A read-only deliverables-packager (via /publish) renders the .md spine into client-ready Excel/Word/PDF, keeping .md the single source of truth. Stack-agnostic: each specialist learns the host project's stack and conventions from its CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/.
